hero.tagline: We build a culture where technology is the drive

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Who We Are
about.description: IVN Labs is a team of professionals who turn ideas into innovative technological solutions. We specialize in software development, web applications, mobile applications, and IT consulting.
about.itparkText: We are official residents of IT Park Uzbekistan, which confirms our status as an innovative technology company.
about.missionText: To create technological solutions that transform businesses and improve people's lives.
about.innovationText: We always seek new approaches and technologies
about.qualityText: Every project is executed at the highest level
about.partnershipText: We build long-term relationships with clients

integration1c.title: 1C Integration with External Systems
integration1c.description: We configure data exchange between 1C and any services: websites, CRM, ERP, warehouses, banking systems. We ensure stable exchange, operation automation, and elimination of manual work.

webDevelopment.title: Website Development
webDevelopment.description: We create modern, fast, and user-friendly websites for business needs — from corporate portals to product landing pages. We design structure, design, and integrations for real processes.

crmDevelopment.title: CRM Development
crmDevelopment.description: We design and create CRM systems tailored to specific company business processes, not a 'universal template'. We automate sales, applications, documents, and interdepartmental interaction.

botDevelopment.title: Bot Development
botDevelopment.description: We create Telegram bots for automating applications, accounting, sales, and internal company processes. We work with AI bots, integrations, databases, and complex logic.

automation.title: Process Automation
automation.description: We digitize and optimize business processes, reducing manual operations and eliminating errors. We build end-to-end work chains between employees, departments, and systems.

biAnalytics.title: BI Analytics (Power BI)
biAnalytics.description: We create dashboards and reports that provide business transparency and data for decision-making. We integrate with 1C, SQL, CRM, and any sources, forming a unified analytics system.

aiAgents.title: AI Agents
aiAgents.description: We develop AI assistants and digital agents for automating communication, information analysis, and routine task execution.

bitrix.title: Bitrix Implementation
bitrix.description: We configure and adapt Bitrix24 to company business processes: sales, tasks, communications, and automation. We create funnels, integrations, robots, reports, and train teams for effective system work.

rost.title: ROST
rost.description: Rost is a management accounting system that combines sales, warehouse, finance, and analytics into a single platform. It allows business owners and managers to get accurate data about company activities and make quick decisions.
